# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
- notify
- build
- deploy

variables:
    CI_JOB_NAME: "notify on build"
    COMMIT_MSG: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE
    MR_TITLE: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
    MR_DESCRIPTION: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION
    DEPLOY_TAG: ${CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG}-$MR_TITLE
        
notify:
    stage: notify
    script:
        - >
            echo "Building commit - ${COMMIT_MSG}.
            Merge request title: ${MR_TITLE},
            Merge request description: ${MR_DESCRIPTION}"

build:
    stage: build
    script: 
        - >
            echo "Building application with the following merge request - ${MR_TITLE}"

deploy:
    stage: deploy
    script:
        - >
            echo "Deploying with tag ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    environment:
        name: production
        url: https://$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE.gitlab.io/$CI_PROJECT_NAME/
    only:
        - master
    tags:
        - docker
        - ${DEPLOY_TAG}
